questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司最近将单体应用程序迁移到 Amazon EC2 实例和 Amazon RDS。该应用程序具有紧密耦合的模块。应用程序的现有设计使应用程序能够仅在单个 EC2 实例上运行。该公司注意到 EC2 实例在高峰使用时间的 CPU 利用率很高。高 CPU 利用率对应于 Amazon RDS 上读取请求的性能下降。该公司希望降低高 CPU 利用率并提高读取请求性能。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company recently migrated a monolithic application to an Amazon EC2 instance and Amazon RDS. The application has tightly coupled modules. The existing design of the application gives the application the ability to run on only a single EC2 instance. The company has noticed high CPU utilization on the EC2 instance during peak usage times. The high CPU utilization corresponds to degraded performance on Amazon RDS for read requests. The company wants to reduce the high CPU utilization and improve read request performance. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 将 EC2 实例大小调整为具有更多 CPU 容量的 EC2 实例类型。配置 Auto Scaling 组，最小和最大大小均为 1。为读取请求配置 RDS 只读副本。
A.en: Resize the EC2 instance to an EC2 instance type that has more CPU capacity. Configure an Auto Scaling group with a minimum and maximum size of 1. Configure an RDS read replica for read requests.

B.zh: 将 EC2 实例大小调整为具有更多 CPU 容量的 EC2 实例类型。配置 Auto Scaling 组，最小和最大大小均为 1。添加 RDS 只读副本并将所有读/写流量重定向到该副本。
B.en: Resize the EC2 instance to an EC2 instance type that has more CPU capacity. Configure an Auto Scaling group with a minimum and maximum size of 1. Add an RDS read replica and redirect all read/write traffic to the replica.

C.zh: 配置 Auto Scaling 组，最小大小为 1，最大大小为 2。将 RDS 数据库实例大小调整为具有更多 CPU 容量的实例类型。
C.en: Configure an Auto Scaling group with a minimum size of 1 and maximum size of 2. Resize the RDS DB instance to an instance type that has more CPU capacity.

D.zh: 将 EC2 实例大小调整为具有更多 CPU 容量的 EC2 实例类型。配置 Auto Scaling 组的最小和最大大小均为 1。将 RDS 数据库实例的大小调整为具有更多 CPU 容量的实例类型。
D.en: Resize the EC2 instance to an EC2 instance type that has more CPU capacity. Configure an Auto Scaling group with a minimum and maximum size of 1. Resize the RDS DB instance to an instance type that has more CPU capacity.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：调整 EC2 实例大小以增加 CPU 容量可以解决 CPU 利用率高的问题。正确：将 Auto Scaling 组的最小和最大大小配置为 1，以确保单实例运行满足当前应用程序的设计约束。正确：添加 RDS 只读副本可以通过卸载读取请求来提高数据库性能。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Resizing your EC2 instance to increase CPU capacity can resolve high CPU utilization issues. Correct: Configure the Auto Scaling group's minimum and maximum sizes to 1 to ensure that the single-instance run meets the current application's design constraints. Correct: Adding RDS read replicas can improve database performance by offloading read requests.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： RDS只读副本仅用于处理读请求，无法处理写请求。将所有读/写流量重定向到只读副本是不正确的。正确：调整 EC2 实例大小以增加 CPU 容量可以解决 CPU 利用率过高的问题。正确：将Auto Scaling组的最小和最大大小配置为1，与当前应用程序的设计约束一致。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: RDS read-only replicas are only used to process read requests and cannot process write requests. It is incorrect to redirect all read/write traffic to read replicas. Correct: Resizing your EC2 instance to increase CPU capacity can resolve high CPU utilization. Correct: Configure the Auto Scaling group's minimum and maximum sizes to 1, consistent with the design constraints of the current application.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：当前应用程序设计为仅在单个 EC2 实例上运行，因此将最大 Auto Scaling 组大小设置为 2 是不够的。正确：调整RDS实例增加CPU容量可以提升数据库性能，但无法解决读请求分流问题。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The current application is designed to run only on a single EC2 instance, so setting the maximum Auto Scaling group size to 2 is not sufficient. Correct: Adjusting the RDS instance to increase the CPU capacity can improve database performance, but it cannot solve the problem of read request offloading.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

answer_text.zh: A. 将 EC2 实例大小调整为具有更多 CPU 容量的 EC2 实例类型。配置 Auto Scaling 组，最小和最大大小均为 1。为读取请求配置 RDS 只读副本。
answer_text.en: A. Resize the EC2 instance to an EC2 instance type that has more CPU capacity. Configure an Auto Scaling group with a minimum and maximum size of 1. Configure an RDS read replica for read requests.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：调整 EC2 实例大小以增加 CPU 容量可以解决 CPU 利用率高的问题。正确：将 Auto Scaling 组的最小和最大大小配置为 1，以确保单实例运行满足当前应用程序的设计约束。正确：添加 RDS 只读副本可以通过卸载读取请求来提高数据库性能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Resizing your EC2 instance to increase CPU capacity can resolve high CPU utilization issues. Correct: Configure the Auto Scaling group's minimum and maximum sizes to 1 to ensure that the single-instance run meets the current application's design constraints. Correct: Adding RDS read replicas can improve database performance by offloading read requests.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司需要授予开发团队访问公司 AWS 资源的权限。公司必须保持资源的高度安全。该公司需要一种访问控制解决方案来防止未经授权的访问敏感数据。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to grant a team of developers access to the company's AWS resources. The company must maintain a high level of security for the resources. The company requires an access control solution that will prevent unauthorized access to the sensitive data. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 与团队其他成员共享每个开发团队成员的 IAM 用户凭证，以简化访问管理并简化开发工作流程。
A.en: Share the IAM user credentials for each development team member with the rest of the team to simplify access management and to streamline development workflows.

B.zh: 根据最小权限原则定义具有细粒度权限的 IAM 角色。为每个开发人员分配 IAM 角色。
B.en: Define IAM roles that have fine-grained permissions based on the principle of least privilege. Assign an IAM role to each developer.

C.zh: 创建 IAM 访问密钥以授予对 AWS 资源的编程访问权限。仅允许开发人员使用访问密钥通过 API 调用与 AWS 资源交互。
C.en: Create IAM access keys to grant programmatic access to AWS resources. Allow only developers to interact with AWS resources through API calls by using the access keys.

D.zh: 创建 AWS Cognito 用户池。使用用户池授予开发人员对 AWS 资源的访问权限。
D.en: Create an AWS Cognito user pool. Grant developers access to AWS resources by using the user pool.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：共享 IAM 用户凭证违反了安全最佳实践，因为它会带来凭证泄露的风险。错误：无法对敏感数据实施细粒度的访问控制。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Sharing IAM user credentials violates security best practices because it creates the risk of credential compromise. Error: Unable to implement fine-grained access control on sensitive data.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：基于最小权限原则定义 IAM 角色是 AWS 推荐的最佳实践。正确： IAM 角色可以通过临时凭证提供细粒度的权限控制和对资源的安全访问。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Defining IAM roles based on the principle of least privilege is an AWS recommended best practice. Correct: IAM roles can provide fine-grained permission control and secure access to resources through temporary credentials.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然可以通过访问密钥进行编程访问，但长期使用静态访问密钥存在安全风险。错误：无法实现基于最小权限的细粒度控制。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While programmatic access is possible through access keys, long-term use of static access keys is a security risk. Error: Fine-grained control based on least privileges cannot be implemented.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Cognito 主要用于管理应用程序用户身份，而不是直接管理对 AWS 资源的访问。错误：无法满足敏感数据的细粒度权限控制要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Cognito is primarily used to manage application user identities, rather than directly managing access to AWS resources. Error: Unable to meet fine-grained permission control requirements for sensitive data.

answer_text.zh: B. 根据最小权限原则定义具有细粒度权限的 IAM 角色。为每个开发人员分配 IAM 角色。
answer_text.en: B. Define IAM roles that have fine-grained permissions based on the principle of least privilege. Assign an IAM role to each developer.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (75%) C (17%) 8%。热门讨论与考点摘要：基于最小权限原则定义 IAM 角色是 AWS 推荐的最佳实践。正确： IAM 角色可以通过临时凭证提供细粒度的权限控制和对资源的安全访问。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (75%) C (17%) 8%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Defining IAM roles based on the principle of least privilege is an AWS recommended best practice. Correct: IAM roles can provide fine-grained permission control and secure access to resources through temporary credentials.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon EC2 实例上托管一个整体 Web 应用程序。应用程序用户最近报告在特定时间性能不佳。对 Amazon CloudWatch 指标的分析显示，在性能不佳期间， CPU 利用率为 100%。该公司希望解决此性能问题并提高应用程序可用性。哪种步骤组合能够最经济有效地满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company hosts a monolithic web application on an Amazon EC2 instance. Application users have recently reported poor performance at specific times. Analysis of Amazon CloudWatch metrics shows that CPU utilization is 100% during the periods of poor performance. The company wants to resolve this performance issue and improve application availability. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用 AWS Compute Optimizer 获取实例类型垂直扩展的建议。
A.en: Use AWS Compute Optimizer to obtain a recommendation for an instance type to scale vertically.

B.zh: 从 Web 服务器创建 Amazon 机器映像 (AMI)。在新的启动模板中引用 AMI。
B.en: Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) from the web server. Reference the AMI in a new launch template.

C.zh: 创建 Auto Scaling 组和 Application Load Balancer 以进行垂直扩展。
C.en: Create an Auto Scaling group and an Application Load Balancer to scale vertically.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Compute Optimizer 获取实例类型的建议以进行水平扩展。
D.en: Use AWS Compute Optimizer to obtain a recommendation for an instance type to scale horizontally.

E.zh: 创建 Auto Scaling 组和 Application Load Balancer 以进行水平扩展。
E.en: Create an Auto Scaling group and an Application Load Balancer to scale horizontally.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确。 AWS Compute Optimizer 会分析当前实例的性能，并推荐用于垂直扩展的更高性能的实例类型。这是解决CPU利用率高问题的有效方法。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. AWS Compute Optimizer analyzes the performance of your current instances and recommends higher-performance instance types for vertical scaling. This is an effective way to solve the problem of high CPU utilization.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。创建 AMI 和启动模板是部署新实例的一个步骤，但它本身并不能解决性能问题或直接提高应用程序可用性。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. Creating an AMI and launch template is a step in deploying new instances, but it does not by itself solve performance issues or directly improve application availability.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。 Auto Scaling 组和 Application Load Balancer 通常用于水平扩展，而不是垂直扩展。垂直扩展是通过替换更高性能的实例类型来实现的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. Auto Scaling groups and Application Load Balancers are typically used for horizontal scaling, not vertical scaling. Vertical scaling is achieved by replacing higher performance instance types.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。 AWS Compute Optimizer 主要用于为单个实例推荐优化类型，而不是水平可扩展的架构设计。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. AWS Compute Optimizer is primarily used to recommend optimization types for individual instances rather than horizontally scalable architectural designs.

E.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确。通过创建弹性伸缩组和负载均衡器，您可以实现水平扩展并动态增加实例数量以应对高负载，从而提高应用程序的可用性。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. By creating auto scaling groups and load balancers, you can achieve horizontal scaling and dynamically increase the number of instances to cope with high loads, thereby improving application availability.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 AWS Compute Optimizer 获取实例类型垂直扩展的建议。；E. 创建 Auto Scaling 组和 Application Load Balancer 以进行水平扩展。
answer_text.en: A. Use AWS Compute Optimizer to obtain a recommendation for an instance type to scale vertically.; E. Create an Auto Scaling group and an Application Load Balancer to scale horizontally.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： AE (49%) BE (46%) 6%。热门讨论与考点摘要：正确。 AWS Compute Optimizer 会分析当前实例的性能，并推荐用于垂直扩展的更高性能的实例类型。这是解决CPU利用率高问题的有效方法。；正确。通过创建弹性伸缩组和负载均衡器，您可以实现水平扩展并动态增加实例数量以应对高负载，从而提高应用程序的可用性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AE (49%) BE (46%) 6%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Correct. AWS Compute Optimizer analyzes the performance of your current instances and recommends higher-performance instance types for vertical scaling. This is an effective way to solve the problem of high CPU utilization.; Correct. By creating auto scaling groups and load balancers, you can achieve horizontal scaling and dynamically increase the number of instances to cope with high loads, thereby improving application availability.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 云中运行其所有业务应用程序。该公司使用 AWS Organizations 来管理多个 AWS 账户。解决方案架构师需要检查授予 IAM 用户的所有权限，以确定哪些 IAM 用户拥有比所需更多的权限。哪种解决方案能够以最少的管理开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs all its business applications in the AWS Cloud. The company uses AWS Organizations to manage multiple AWS accounts. A solutions architect needs to review all permissions that are granted to IAM users to determine which IAM users have more permissions than required. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST administrative overhead?

A.zh: 使用网络访问分析器查看公司 AWS 账户中的所有访问权限。
A.en: Use Network Access Analyzer to review all access permissions in the company's AWS accounts.

B.zh: 创建一个 AWS CloudWatch 警报，该警报会在 IAM 用户在 AWS 账户中创建或修改资源时激活。
B.en: Create an AWS CloudWatch alarm that activates when an IAM user creates or modifies resources in an AWS account.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 访问分析器查看公司的所有资源和账户。
C.en: Use AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) Access Analyzer to review all the company’s resources and accounts.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon Inspector 查找现有 IAM 策略中的漏洞。
D.en: Use Amazon Inspector to find vulnerabilities in existing IAM policies.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：网络访问分析器主要用于分析网络访问路径和网络配置，并非专门用于检查 IAM 用户权限。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Network Access Analyzer is primarily used to analyze network access paths and network configurations, and is not specifically designed to check IAM user permissions.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： CloudWatch 可以监控事件，但无法直接审核 IAM 用户权限。这种方法需要额外的配置和手动分析，增加了管理开销。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudWatch can monitor events but cannot directly audit IAM user permissions. This approach requires additional configuration and manual analysis, adding administrative overhead.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： IAM 访问分析器专为分析权限和识别权限过高问题而设计，是解决此问题的最佳工具。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Designed specifically to analyze permissions and identify over-privilege issues, IAM Access Analyzer is the best tool to solve this problem.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Inspector 主要用于检查 EC2 实例、容器和 Lambda 函数是否存在安全漏洞，而不是检查 IAM 权限。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Inspector is primarily used to check EC2 instances, containers, and Lambda functions for security vulnerabilities rather than checking IAM permissions.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 访问分析器查看公司的所有资源和账户。
answer_text.en: C. Use AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) Access Analyzer to review all the company’s resources and accounts.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： IAM 访问分析器专为分析权限和识别权限过高问题而设计，是解决此问题的最佳工具。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Designed specifically to analyze permissions and identify over-privilege issues, IAM Access Analyzer is the best tool to solve this problem.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司需要实施新的数据保留策略以确保合规性。作为此策略的一部分，必须保护存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中的敏感文档在固定的时间内不被删除或修改。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to implement a new data retention policy for regulatory compliance. As part of this policy, sensitive documents that are stored in an Amazon S3 bucket must be protected from deletion or modification for a fixed period of time. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在所需对象上激活 S3 对象锁定并启用治理模式。
A.en: Activate S3 Object Lock on the required objects and enable governance mode.

B.zh: 在所需对象上激活 S3 对象锁定并启用合规性模式。
B.en: Activate S3 Object Lock on the required objects and enable compliance mode.

C.zh: 在 S3 存储桶上启用版本控制。设置生命周期策略以在指定时间段后删除对象。
C.en: Enable versioning on the S3 bucket. Set a lifecycle policy to delete the objects after a specified period.

D.zh: 配置 S3 生命周期策略以将对象在保留期内过渡到 S3 Glacier 灵活检索。
D.en: Configure an S3 Lifecycle policy to transition objects to S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval for the retention duration.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：治理模式允许特定用户（具有适当的权限）绕过锁定并删除或修改对象。这种模式并不能完全满足“防止删除或修改”的要求，因为授权用户仍然可以对对象进行操作。因此，该选项不符合题目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Governance mode allows specific users (with appropriate permissions) to bypass locks and delete or modify objects. This mode does not fully satisfy the "protect from deletion or modification" requirement because authorized users can still operate on the object. Therefore, this option does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：合规模式完全防止对象被删除或修改，即使具有管理员权限的用户也无法覆盖锁定。这种模式完全满足问题的要求，保证敏感文档在固定时间内无法被删除或修改。该选项是正确答案。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Compliance mode completely prevents objects from being deleted or modified, and even users with administrator rights cannot override the lock. This mode fully meets the requirements of the problem and ensures that sensitive documents cannot be deleted or modified within a fixed period of time. This option is the correct answer.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：版本控制可以保留对象的历史版本，但不能防止对象被删除或修改。生命周期策略仅用于管理对象的存储时间，无法满足“防止删除或修改”的要求。该选项不符合题目要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Versioning can preserve historical versions of objects, but it cannot prevent objects from being deleted or modified. Lifecycle policies are only used to manage the storage time of objects and cannot meet the requirement of "preventing deletion or modification". This option does not meet the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：将对象移至 S3 Glacier 灵活检索可降低存储成本，但不能防止对象被删除或修改。该选项不符合题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Moving objects to S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval reduces storage costs but does not prevent objects from being deleted or modified. This option does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: B. 在所需对象上激活 S3 对象锁定并启用合规性模式。
answer_text.en: B. Activate S3 Object Lock on the required objects and enable compliance mode.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (88%) 13%。热门讨论与考点摘要：合规模式完全防止对象被删除或修改，即使具有管理员权限的用户也无法覆盖锁定。这种模式完全满足问题的要求，保证敏感文档在固定时间内无法被删除或修改。该选项是正确答案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (88%) 13%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Compliance mode completely prevents objects from being deleted or modified, and even users with administrator rights cannot override the lock. This mode fully meets the requirements of the problem and ensures that sensitive documents cannot be deleted or modified within a fixed period of time. This option is the correct answer.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在容器上运行其面向客户的 Web 应用程序。该工作负载使用 AWS Fargate 上的 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)。 Web 应用程序是资源密集型的。 Web 应用程序需要每周 7 天、每天 24 小时为客户提供服务。该公司预计该应用程序会经历短暂的高流量爆发。工作负载必须具有高可用性。哪种解决方案能够最具成本效益地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs its customer-facing web application on containers. The workload uses Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on AWS Fargate. The web application is resource intensive. The web application needs to be available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week for customers. The company expects the application to experience short bursts of high traffic. The workload must be highly available. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 使用 Fargate 配置 ECS 容量提供程序。使用第三方工具进行负载测试。调整 Amazon CloudWatch 中的 Fargate 任务规模。
A.en: Configure an ECS capacity provider with Fargate. Conduct load testing by using a third-party tool. Rightsize the Fargate tasks in Amazon CloudWatch.

B.zh: 使用 Fargate 来配置 ECS 容量提供程序以实现稳定状态，并使用 Fargate Spot 来配置突发流量。
B.en: Configure an ECS capacity provider with Fargate for steady state and Fargate Spot for burst traffic.

C.zh: 使用 Fargate Spot 配置 ECS 容量提供程序以实现稳定状态，并使用 Fargate 配置突发流量。
C.en: Configure an ECS capacity provider with Fargate Spot for steady state and Fargate for burst traffic.

D.zh: 使用 Fargate 配置 ECS 容量提供程序。使用 AWS Compute Optimizer 调整 Fargate 任务的大小。
D.en: Configure an ECS capacity provider with Fargate. Use AWS Compute Optimizer to rightsize the Fargate task.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：该解决方案满足问题中的关键功能和非功能需求，并且与相关AWS服务的设计意图和最佳实践一致。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: The solution meets the key functional and non-functional requirements in the problem and is consistent with the design intent and best practices of the relevant AWS service.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 Fargate 来配置 ECS 容量提供程序以实现稳定状态，并使用 Fargate Spot 来配置突发流量。
answer_text.en: B. Configure an ECS capacity provider with Fargate for steady state and Fargate Spot for burst traffic.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 云中构建应用程序。该应用程序托管在应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 后面的 Amazon EC2 实例上。该公司使用 Amazon Route 53 作为 DNS。该公司需要一个能够主动参与的托管解决方案来检测 DDoS 攻击。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is building an application in the AWS Cloud. The application is hosted on Amazon EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). The company uses Amazon Route 53 for the DNS. The company needs a managed solution with proactive engagement to detect against DDoS attacks. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 启用 AWS 配置。配置检测 DDoS 攻击的 AWS Config 托管规则。
A.en: Enable AWS Config. Configure an AWS Config managed rule that detects DDoS attacks.

B.zh: 在 AL 上启用 AWS WAF 创建 AWS WAF Web ACL，其中包含检测和防止 DDoS 攻击的规则。将 Web ACL 与 ALB 关联。
B.en: Enable AWS WAF on the ALCreate an AWS WAF web ACL with rules to detect and prevent DDoS attacks. Associate the web ACL with the ALB.

C.zh: 将 ALB 访问日志存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。配置 Amazon GuardDuty 以检测 DDoS 攻击并采取自动预防措施。
C.en: Store the ALB access logs in an Amazon S3 bucket. Configure Amazon GuardDuty to detect and take automated preventative actions for DDoS attacks.

D.zh: 订阅 AWS Shield Advanced。在 Route 53 中配置托管区域。将 ALB 资源添加为受保护资源。
D.en: Subscribe to AWS Shield Advanced. Configure hosted zones in Route 53. Add ALB resources as protected resources.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Config主要用于资源配置的合规性检查和审计，不具备检测或防御DDoS攻击的功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Config is mainly used for compliance checking and auditing of resource configuration, and does not have the function of detecting or defending against DDoS attacks.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon GuardDuty主要用于检测恶意活动和异常行为（例如恶意IP地址、异常流量），但不具备直接防御DDoS攻击的功能。 GuardDuty 无法提供主动 DDoS 防护和事件响应服务。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon GuardDuty is mainly used to detect malicious activities and abnormal behaviors (such as malicious IP addresses, abnormal traffic), but it does not have the function to directly defend against DDoS attacks. GuardDuty cannot provide proactive DDoS protection and incident response services.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS Shield Advanced 是 AWS 的一款托管解决方案，旨在防范 DDoS 攻击，包括主动监控、事件响应支持和对受保护资源的经济补偿。它支持与 Route 53 和 ALB 集成，以提供全面的 DDoS 防护。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Shield Advanced is a managed solution from AWS designed to protect against DDoS attacks and includes proactive monitoring, incident response support, and financial compensation for protected resources. It supports integration with Route 53 and ALB to provide comprehensive DDoS protection.

answer_text.zh: D. 订阅 AWS Shield Advanced。在 Route 53 中配置托管区域。将 ALB 资源添加为受保护资源。
answer_text.en: D. Subscribe to AWS Shield Advanced. Configure hosted zones in Route 53. Add ALB resources as protected resources.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS Shield Advanced 是 AWS 的一款托管解决方案，旨在防范 DDoS 攻击，包括主动监控、事件响应支持和对受保护资源的经济补偿。它支持与 Route 53 和 ALB 集成，以提供全面的 DDoS 防护。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Shield Advanced is a managed solution from AWS designed to protect against DDoS attacks and includes proactive monitoring, incident response support, and financial compensation for protected resources. It supports integration with Route 53 and ALB to provide comprehensive DDoS protection.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 VPC 中托管视频流 Web 应用程序。该公司使用网络负载均衡器 (NLB) 来处理 TCP 流量以进行实时数据处理。存在未经授权的尝试访问该应用程序的情况。该公司希望通过最小的架构更改来提高应用程序的安全性，以防止未经授权的尝试访问应用程序。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts a video streaming web application in a VPC. The company uses a Network Load Balancer (NLB) to handle TCP traffic for real-time data processing. There have been unauthorized attempts to access the application. The company wants to improve application security with minimal architectural change to prevent unauthorized attempts to access the application. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 直接在 NLB 上实施一系列 AWS WAF 规则以过滤掉未经授权的流量。
A.en: Implement a series of AWS WAF rules directly on the NLB to filter out unauthorized traffic.

B.zh: 使用安全组重新创建 NLB 以仅允许受信任的 IP 地址。
B.en: Recreate the NLB with a security group to allow only trusted IP addresses.

C.zh: 与配置了严格 IP 地址允许列表的现有 NLB 并行部署第二个 NLB。
C.en: Deploy a second NLB in parallel with the existing NLB configured with a strict IP address allow list.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Shield Advanced 提供增强的 DDoS 保护并防止未经授权的访问尝试。
D.en: Use AWS Shield Advanced to provide enhanced DDoS protection and prevent unauthorized access attempts.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：该解决方案满足问题中的关键功能和非功能需求，并且与相关AWS服务的设计意图和最佳实践一致。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: The solution meets the key functional and non-functional requirements in the problem and is consistent with the design intent and best practices of the relevant AWS service.

answer_text.zh: D. 使用 AWS Shield Advanced 提供增强的 DDoS 保护并防止未经授权的访问尝试。
answer_text.en: D. Use AWS Shield Advanced to provide enhanced DDoS protection and prevent unauthorized access attempts.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (53%) B (42%) 5%。热门讨论与考点摘要：该解决方案满足问题中的关键功能和非功能需求，并且与相关AWS服务的设计意图和最佳实践一致。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (53%) B (42%) 5%. Popular discussion and key point summary: The solution meets the key functional and non-functional requirements in the problem and is consistent with the design intent and best practices of the relevant AWS service.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家医疗保健公司正在开发一个 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数将通知发布到加密的 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题。通知包含受保护的健康信息 (PHI)。 SNS 主题使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 客户管理的密钥进行加密。公司必须确保应用程序具有将消息安全地发布到 SNS 主题所需的权限。哪种步骤组合可以满足这些要求？ （选择三项。）
question_text.en: A healthcare company is developing an AWS Lambda function that publishes notifications to an encrypted Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic. The notifications contain protected health information (PHI). The SNS topic uses AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed keys for encryption. The company must ensure that the application has the necessary permissions to publish messages securely to the SNS topic. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

A.zh: 为 SNS 主题创建资源策略，允许 Lambda 函数向该主题发布消息。
A.en: Create a resource policy for the SNS topic that allows the Lambda function to publish messages to the topic.

B.zh: 对 SNS 主题使用带有 AWS KMS 密钥 (SSE-KMS) 的服务器端加密，而不是客户管理的密钥。
B.en: Use server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS) for the SNS topic instead of customer managed keys.

C.zh: 为 SNS 主题使用的具有必要 AWS KMS 权限的加密密钥创建资源策略。
C.en: Create a resource policy for the encryption key that the SNS topic uses that has the necessary AWS KMS permissions.

D.zh: 在 SNS 主题的资源策略中指定 Lambda 函数的 Amazon 资源名称 (ARN)。
D.en: Specify the Lambda function's Amazon Resource Name (ARN) in the SNS topic's resource policy.

E.zh: 将 Amazon API Gateway HTTP API 与 SNS 主题关联，以使用 API Gateway 资源策略控制对该主题的访问。
E.en: Associate an Amazon API Gateway HTTP API with the SNS topic to control access to the topic by using API Gateway resource policies.

F.zh: 配置一个 Lambda 执行角色，该角色具有使用 AWS KMS 中的客户托管密钥所需的 IAM 权限。
F.en: Configure a Lambda execution role that has the necessary IAM permissions to use a customer managed key in AWS KMS.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确。 SNS 主题需要资源策略以允许 Lambda 函数发布消息。资源策略是控制对 SNS 主题的访问的关键部分。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. The SNS topic requires a resource policy to allow the Lambda function to publish messages. Resource policies are a key part of controlling access to SNS topics.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。该问题明确指出， SNS 主题是使用客户管理的密钥进行加密的，因此无需将其替换为 SSE-KMS。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. The question clearly states that SNS topics are encrypted with customer-managed keys, so there is no need to replace them with SSE-KMS.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确。 SNS 主题使用的加密密钥需要资源策略来授予必要的 AWS KMS 权限，以确保 Lambda 函数可以安全地使用该密钥。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. The encryption key used by the SNS topic requires a resource policy to grant the necessary AWS KMS permissions to ensure that the key can be used securely by Lambda functions.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。尽管可以在 SNS 资源策略中指定 Lambda 函数的 ARN，但这不是问题所需的最佳实践。问题更多地集中在加密和权限管理上。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. Although it is possible to specify the ARN of the Lambda function in the SNS resource policy, this is not the best practice required by the problem. The questions focus more on encryption and permissions management.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。 API网关和SNS主题之间的关系不相关，并且问题没有提到需要通过API网关控制访问。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. The relationship between API Gateway and SNS topics is not relevant, and the question does not mention the need to control access via API Gateway.

F.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确。 Lambda 函数需要一个执行角色，该执行角色具有必要的 IAM 权限才能使用客户管理的密钥，以便能够安全地发布加密消息。
F.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. The Lambda function requires an execution role with the necessary IAM permissions to use customer-managed keys to be able to securely publish encrypted messages.

answer_text.zh: A. 为 SNS 主题创建资源策略，允许 Lambda 函数向该主题发布消息。；C. 为 SNS 主题使用的具有必要 AWS KMS 权限的加密密钥创建资源策略。；F. 配置一个 Lambda 执行角色，该角色具有使用 AWS KMS 中的客户托管密钥所需的 IAM 权限。
answer_text.en: A. Create a resource policy for the SNS topic that allows the Lambda function to publish messages to the topic.; C. Create a resource policy for the encryption key that the SNS topic uses that has the necessary AWS KMS permissions.; F. Configure a Lambda execution role that has the necessary IAM permissions to use a customer managed key in AWS KMS.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： ACF (71%) ADF (29%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：正确。 SNS 主题需要资源策略以允许 Lambda 函数发布消息。资源策略是控制对 SNS 主题的访问的关键部分。；正确。 SNS 主题使用的加密密钥需要资源策略来授予必要的 AWS KMS 权限，以确保 Lambda 函数可以安全地使用该密钥。；正确。 Lambda 函数需要一个执行角色，该执行角色具有必要的 IAM 权限才能使用客户管理的密钥，以便能够安全地发布加密消息。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: ACF (71%) ADF (29%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Correct. The SNS topic requires a resource policy to allow the Lambda function to publish messages. Resource policies are a key part of controlling access to SNS topics.; Correct. The encryption key used by the SNS topic requires a resource policy to grant the necessary AWS KMS permissions to ensure that the key can be used securely by Lambda functions.; Correct. The Lambda function requires an execution role with the necessary IAM permissions to use customer-managed keys to be able to securely publish encrypted messages.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一个员工门户网站。员工登录门户查看工资详细信息。该公司正在开发一种新系统，使员工能够上传扫描文件以进行报销。该公司运行一个程序从文档中提取基于文本的数据，并将提取的信息附加到每个员工的报销 ID 中进行处理。员工门户网站需要 100% 的正常运行时间。文档提取程序全天根据需要偶尔运行。该公司希望构建一个可扩展且经济高效的新系统，只需对现有门户网站进行最少的更改。该公司不想进行任何代码更改。哪种解决方案能够以最少的实施工作满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an employee web portal. Employees log in to the portal to view payroll details. The company is developing a new system to give employees the ability to upload scanned documents for reimbursement. The company runs a program to extract text-based data from the documents and attach the extracted information to each employee’s reimbursement IDs for processing. The employee web portal requires 100% uptime. The document extract program runs infrequently throughout the day on an on- demand basis. The company wants to build a scalable and cost-effective new system that will require minimal changes to the existing web portal. The company does not want to make any code changes. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST implementation effort?

A.zh: 在 Web 门户的 Auto Scaling 组中运行 Amazon EC2 按需型实例。使用 AWS Lambda 函数运行文档提取程序。当员工上传新的报销单据时调用 Lambda 函数。
A.en: Run Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances in an Auto Scaling group for the web portal. Use an AWS Lambda function to run the document extract program. Invoke the Lambda function when an employee uploads a new reimbursement document.

B.zh: 在 Web 门户的 Auto Scaling 组中运行 Amazon EC2 竞价型实例。在 EC2 竞价型实例上运行文档提取程序。当员工上传新的报销文档时启动文档提取程序实例。
B.en: Run Amazon EC2 Spot Instances in an Auto Scaling group for the web portal. Run the document extract program on EC2 Spot Instances. Start document extract program instances when an employee uploads a new reimbursement document.

C.zh: 购买 Savings Plan 来运行门户网站和文档提取程序。在 Auto Scaling 组中运行 Web 门户和文档提取程序。
C.en: Purchase a Savings Plan to run the web portal and the document extract program. Run the web portal and the document extract program in an Auto Scaling group.

D.zh: 创建 Amazon S3 存储桶来托管 Web 门户。使用 Amazon API Gateway 和 AWS Lambda 函数来实现现有功能。使用 Lambda 函数运行文档提取程序。当调用与新文档上传关联的 API 时，调用 Lambda 函数。
D.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket to host the web portal. Use Amazon API Gateway and an AWS Lambda function for the existing functionalities. Use the Lambda function to run the document extract program. Invoke the Lambda function when the API that is associated with a new document upload is called.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析： EC2按需型实例可以提供高可用性和按需扩展性，满足门户100%正常运行的要求。 AWS Lambda 是无服务器的，适合不经常运行的文档提取器。调用Lambda函数时无需更改现有代码。优点：高可用性、成本优化、最少的实施工作。缺点：没有明显的缺点。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: EC2 on-demand instances can provide high availability and on-demand scalability to meet the portal's 100% uptime requirements. AWS Lambda is serverless and suitable for document extractors that run infrequently. There is no need to change existing code when invoking Lambda functions. Advantages: High availability, cost optimization, minimal implementation effort. Disadvantages: No obvious disadvantages.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： EC2 竞价型实例价格实惠，但不适合需要 100% 正常运行时间的门户，因为 竞价型实例可能会中断。优点：成本较低。缺点：无法保证门户的高可用性，并且需要额外的逻辑来启动文档提取器实例。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: EC2 Spot instances are affordable, but not suitable for portals that require 100% uptime because Spot instances can be interrupted. Advantages: lower cost. Disadvantages: High availability of the portal is not guaranteed and additional logic is required to start the document extractor instance.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： Savings Plan 可以降低 EC2 成本，但将文档提取器与门户运行在同一个 Auto Scaling 组中会增加复杂性，并且不能满足按需运行的要求。优点：成本优化。缺点：文档提取程序无法按需运行，增加了系统复杂度。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Savings Plan can reduce EC2 costs, but running the document extractor in the same Auto Scaling group as the portal adds complexity and does not meet the requirements of running on demand. Advantages: Cost optimization. Disadvantages: The document extraction program cannot be run on demand, which increases system complexity.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：将门户托管在S3上可以降低成本，但需要对现有门户进行代码更改以支持API网关，这与问题中的“不更改代码”要求相冲突。优点：成本优化。缺点：需要对现有系统进行代码改动，实现工作量较大。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical Analysis: Hosting the portal on S3 reduces costs, but requires code changes to the existing portal to support API Gateway, which conflicts with the "no code changes" requirement in the question. Advantages: Cost optimization. Disadvantages: It requires code changes to the existing system, and the implementation workload is large.

answer_text.zh: A. 在 Web 门户的 Auto Scaling 组中运行 Amazon EC2 按需型实例。使用 AWS Lambda 函数运行文档提取程序。当员工上传新的报销单据时调用 Lambda 函数。
answer_text.en: A. Run Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances in an Auto Scaling group for the web portal. Use an AWS Lambda function to run the document extract program. Invoke the Lambda function when an employee uploads a new reimbursement document.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (60%) C (32%) 8%。热门讨论与考点摘要：技术分析： EC2按需型实例可以提供高可用性和按需扩展性，满足门户100%正常运行的要求。 AWS Lambda 是无服务器的，适合不经常运行的文档提取器。调用Lambda函数时无需更改现有代码。优点：高可用性、成本优化、最少的实施工作。缺点：没有明显的缺点。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (60%) C (32%) 8%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Technical analysis: EC2 on-demand instances can provide high availability and on-demand scalability to meet the portal's 100% uptime requirements. AWS Lambda is serverless and suitable for document extractors that run infrequently. There is no need to change existing code when invoking Lambda functions. Advantages: High availability, cost optimization, minimal implementation effort. Disadvantages: No obvious disadvantages.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家媒体公司在 us-east-1 区域拥有多账户 AWS 环境。该公司的生产账户中有一个 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题，用于发布性能指标。该公司在管理员账户中有一个 AWS Lambda 函数，用于处理和分析日志数据。报告重要指标时，必须由来自生产账户中 SNS 主题的消息调用管理员账户中的 Lambda 函数。哪种步骤组合可以满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A media company has a multi-account AWS environment in the us-east-1 Region. The company has an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic in a production account that publishes performance metrics. The company has an AWS Lambda function in an administrator account to process and analyze log data. The Lambda function that is in the administrator account must be invoked by messages from the SNS topic that is in the production account when significant metrics are reported. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 为 Lambda 函数创建 IAM 资源策略，以允许 Amazon SNS 调用该函数。
A.en: Create an IAM resource policy for the Lambda function that allows Amazon SNS to invoke the function.

B.zh: 在管理员账户中实施 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列，以缓冲来自生产账户中 SNS 主题的消息。配置 SQS 队列以调用 Lambda 函数。
B.en: Implement an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue in the administrator account to buffer messages from the SNS topic that is in the production account. Configure the SQS queue to invoke the Lambda function.

C.zh: 为 SNS 主题创建 IAM 策略，允许 Lambda 函数订阅该主题。
C.en: Create an IAM policy for the SNS topic that allows the Lambda function to subscribe to the topic.

D.zh: 在生产账户中使用 Amazon EventBridge 规则来捕获 SNS 主题通知。配置 EventBridge 规则以将通知转发到管理员账户中的 Lambda 函数。
D.en: Use an Amazon EventBridge rule in the production account to capture the SNS topic notifications. Configure the EventBridge rule to forward notifications to the Lambda function that is in the administrator account.

E.zh: 将性能指标存储在生产账户的 Amazon S3 存储桶中。使用 Amazon Athena 分析管理员账户的指标。
E.en: Store performance metrics in an Amazon S3 bucket in the production account. Use Amazon Athena to analyze the metrics from the administrator account.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： Lambda 函数需要资源策略以允许 SNS 主题调用它。这是与 Lambda 进行跨账户 SNS 集成的必要步骤。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The Lambda function requires a resource policy to allow the SNS topic to invoke it. This is a necessary step for cross-account SNS integration with Lambda.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然SQS可以用来刷新SNS消息，但是问题没有提到需要刷新消息。让SNS调用Lambda函数更符合问题需求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although SQS can be used to refresh SNS messages, the question does not mention the need to refresh messages. Letting SNS call the Lambda function is more in line with the problem requirements.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： SNS 主题需要 IAM 策略以允许跨账户 Lambda 函数订阅它。这是启用与 Lambda 的跨账户 SNS 集成的另一个必要步骤。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The SNS topic requires an IAM policy to allow cross-account Lambda functions to subscribe to it. This is another necessary step to enable cross-account SNS integration with Lambda.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： EventBridge规则可以捕获SNS通知，但问题没有提到需要使用EventBridge。直接使用SNS和Lambda集成更加简单，也满足了问题的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: EventBridge rules can capture SNS notifications, but the question doesn't mention the need to use EventBridge. Directly using SNS and Lambda integration is simpler and meets the requirements of the problem.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该问题要求 SNS 触发 Lambda 函数，而不是存储数据然后进行分析。该选项不符合题目要求。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The question requires the SNS to trigger a Lambda function instead of storing the data and then analyzing it. This option does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: A. 为 Lambda 函数创建 IAM 资源策略，以允许 Amazon SNS 调用该函数。；C. 为 SNS 主题创建 IAM 策略，允许 Lambda 函数订阅该主题。
answer_text.en: A. Create an IAM resource policy for the Lambda function that allows Amazon SNS to invoke the function.; C. Create an IAM policy for the SNS topic that allows the Lambda function to subscribe to the topic.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： AC (48%) AB (40%) 8%。热门讨论与考点摘要： Lambda 函数需要资源策略以允许 SNS 主题调用它。这是与 Lambda 进行跨账户 SNS 集成的必要步骤。； SNS 主题需要 IAM 策略以允许跨账户 Lambda 函数订阅它。这是启用与 Lambda 的跨账户 SNS 集成的另一个必要步骤。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AC (48%) AB (40%) 8%. Popular discussion and key point summary: The Lambda function requires a resource policy to allow the SNS topic to invoke it. This is a necessary step for cross-account SNS integration with Lambda.; The SNS topic requires an IAM policy to allow cross-account Lambda functions to subscribe to it. This is another necessary step to enable cross-account SNS integration with Lambda.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在将应用程序从本地位置迁移到 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)。公司必须为公司 VPC 中的 Pod 使用自定义子网才能满足要求。公司还需要确保 Pod 可以在 Pod 的 VPC 内安全地通信。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is migrating an application from an on-premises location to Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). The company must use a custom subnet for pods that are in the company's VPC to comply with requirements. The company also needs to ensure that the pods can communicate securely within the pods' VPC. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 配置 AWS Transit Gateway 以直接管理 Amazon EKS 中容器的自定义子网配置。
A.en: Configure AWS Transit Gateway to directly manage custom subnet configurations for the pods in Amazon EKS.

B.zh: 创建从公司的本地 IP 地址范围到 EKS Pod 的 AWS Direct Connect 连接。
B.en: Create an AWS Direct Connect connection from the company's on-premises IP address ranges to the EKS pods.

C.zh: 使用适用于 Kubernetes 的 Amazon VPC CNI 插件。在 VPC 集群中定义自定义子网以供 Pod 使用。
C.en: Use the Amazon VPC CNI plugin for Kubernetes. Define custom subnets in the VPC cluster for the pods to use.

D.zh: 实施具有 Pod 反亲和性规则的 Kubernetes 网络策略，以将 Pod 放置限制到自定义子网内的特定节点。
D.en: Implement a Kubernetes network policy that has pod anti-affinity rules to restrict pod placement to specific nodes that are within custom subnets.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Transit Gateway 主要用于连接多个 VPC 本地网络，而不是直接管理 Kubernetes Pod 的子网配置。此选项与问题要求“使用自定义子网”和“确保 VPC 内 Pod 之间的安全通信”无关。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Transit Gateway is mainly used to connect multiple VPC local networks, rather than directly managing the subnet configuration of Kubernetes Pods. This option has nothing to do with the question requirements "Use a custom subnet" and "Ensure secure communication between Pods within the VPC".

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Direct Connect 是一项专线服务，用于将本地数据连接到 AWS 云，无论 Kubernetes Pod 的子网配置如何。此选项不满足问题中“自定义子网”和“VPC 内的安全通信”的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Direct Connect is a dedicated line service for connecting on-premises data to the AWS cloud, regardless of the Kubernetes Pod's subnet configuration. This option does not address the requirements for "Custom subnets" and "Secure communication within the VPC" in the question.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon VPC CNI 插件允许 Kubernetes Pod 使用 VPC 的 IP 地址并支持自定义子网配置。该方案完全满足问题需求，保证VPC内Pod之间的安全通信，并支持自定义子网。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The Amazon VPC CNI plugin allows Kubernetes Pods to use the VPC's IP address and supports custom subnet configuration. This solution fully meets the problem requirements, ensures secure communication between Pods in the VPC, and supports custom subnets.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Kubernetes 网络策略主要用于定义 Pod 的通信规则，而不是直接管理子网配置。 Pod 反亲和性规则仅限制 Pod 的放置，无法满足问题中“自定义子网”和“VPC 内安全通信”的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Kubernetes network policies are mainly used to define communication rules for Pods, rather than directly managing subnet configurations. Pod anti-affinity rules only restrict the placement of Pods and cannot meet the requirements of "custom subnet" and "secure communication within VPC" in the question.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用适用于 Kubernetes 的 Amazon VPC CNI 插件。在 VPC 集群中定义自定义子网以供 Pod 使用。
answer_text.en: C. Use the Amazon VPC CNI plugin for Kubernetes. Define custom subnets in the VPC cluster for the pods to use.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon VPC CNI 插件允许 Kubernetes Pod 使用 VPC 的 IP 地址并支持自定义子网配置。该方案完全满足问题需求，保证VPC内Pod之间的安全通信，并支持自定义子网。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The Amazon VPC CNI plugin allows Kubernetes Pods to use the VPC's IP address and supports custom subnet configuration. This solution fully meets the problem requirements, ensures secure communication between Pods in the VPC, and supports custom subnets.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司托管一个电子商务应用程序，该应用程序将所有数据存储在完全由 AWS 管理的单个 Amazon RDS for MySQL 数据库实例中。公司需要降低单点故障的风险。哪种解决方案能够以最少的实施工作满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts an ecommerce application that stores all data in a single Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance that is fully managed by AWS. The company needs to mitigate the risk of a single point of failure. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST implementation effort?

A.zh: 修改 RDS 数据库实例以使用多可用区部署。在下一个维护时段应用更改。
A.en: Modify the RDS DB instance to use a Multi-AZ deployment. Apply the changes during the next maintenance window.

B.zh: 将当前数据库迁移到新的 Amazon DynamoDB 多可用区部署。使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 和异构迁移策略将当前 RDS 数据库实例迁移到 DynamoDB 表。
B.en: Migrate the current database to a new Amazon DynamoDB Multi-AZ deployment. Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) with a heterogeneous migration strategy to migrate the current RDS DB instance to DynamoDB tables.

C.zh: 在多可用区部署中创建新的 RDS 数据库实例。从最新快照手动还原现有 RDS 数据库实例的数据。
C.en: Create a new RDS DB instance in a Multi-AZ deployment. Manually restore the data from the existing RDS DB instance from the most recent snapshot.

D.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 组中配置数据库实例，组大小至少为 3。使用 Amazon Route 53 简单路由将请求分发到所有数据库实例。
D.en: Configure the DB instance in an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group with a minimum group size of three. Use Amazon Route 53 simple routing to distribute requests to all DB instances.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon RDS 的多可用区部分专门设计用于提高数据库的高可用性和容错能力。启用多可用区后， AWS 会自动在另一个可用区中创建同步副本，并在主实例发生故障时自动切换到该副本。实施成本低：只需修改现有RDS实例配置，无需迁移数据和创建新实例。最少的实施工作：只需在控制台中启用多可用区并在控制台中应用更改。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The Multi-AZ portion of Amazon RDS is specifically designed to increase the high availability and fault tolerance of your database. When Multi-AZ is enabled, AWS automatically creates a synchronized replica in another Availability Zone and automatically switches to that replica if the primary instance fails. Low implementation cost: only need to modify the existing RDS instance configuration, no need to migrate data and create new instances. Minimal implementation effort: Just enable Multi-AZ in the console and apply the changes in the console.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： DynamoDB是一种不同于RDS传统数据库结构的NoSQL数据库。迁移到 DynamoDB 需要架构调整和应用程序转换。实施成本高：需要使用AWS DMS进行异构迁移，并且需要重新设计应用程序模型以适应DynamoDB。不符合“以最小的努力实施”的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: DynamoDB is a NoSQL database that is different from the traditional database structure of RDS. Migrating to DynamoDB requires schema adjustments and application conversion. High implementation costs: Requires use of AWS DMS for heterogeneous migrations, and application models need to be redesigned to accommodate DynamoDB. Does not meet the “implementation with minimum effort” requirement.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然创建新的多可用区 RDS 实例可以实现高可用性，但复制数据需要额外的时间和操作。实施成本高：需要创建新实例、恢复数据，复杂度增加。不符合“以最小的努力实施”的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While creating new Multi-AZ RDS instances can achieve high availability, copying data requires additional time and operations. High implementation cost: new instances need to be created and data restored, increasing complexity. Does not meet the “implementation with minimum effort” requirement.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： EC2 Auto Scaling 组通常与独立服务器而不是数据库实例一起使用。数据库的高可用性通常是通过 RDS 的内置功能（例如多可用区）而不是通过 EC2 Auto Scaling 来实现。实施成本高： EC2实例、Auto Scaling组和Route 53路由规则需要手动配置。不符合“以最小的努力实施”的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: EC2 Auto Scaling groups are typically used with standalone servers rather than database instances. High availability of databases is typically achieved through built-in features of RDS (such as Multi-AZ) rather than through EC2 Auto Scaling. High implementation cost: EC2 instances, Auto Scaling groups, and Route 53 routing rules need to be manually configured. Does not meet the “implementation with minimum effort” requirement.

answer_text.zh: A. 修改 RDS 数据库实例以使用多可用区部署。在下一个维护时段应用更改。
answer_text.en: A. Modify the RDS DB instance to use a Multi-AZ deployment. Apply the changes during the next maintenance window.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon RDS 的多可用区部分专门设计用于提高数据库的高可用性和容错能力。启用多可用区后， AWS 会自动在另一个可用区中创建同步副本，并在主实例发生故障时自动切换到该副本。实施成本低：只需修改现有RDS实例配置，无需迁移数据和创建新实例。最少的实施工作：只需在控制台中启用多可用区并在控制台中应用更改。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The Multi-AZ portion of Amazon RDS is specifically designed to increase the high availability and fault tolerance of your database. When Multi-AZ is enabled, AWS automatically creates a synchronized replica in another Availability Zone and automatically switches to that replica if the primary instance fails. Low implementation cost: only need to modify the existing RDS instance configuration, no need to migrate data and create new instances. Minimal implementation effort: Just enable Multi-AZ in the console and apply the changes in the console.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 某公司拥有多台 Microsoft Windows SMB 文件服务器和 Linux NFS 文件服务器，用于在本地环境中进行文件共享。作为该公司 AWS 迁移计划的一部分，该公司希望整合 AWS 云中的文件服务器。该公司需要支持 NFS 和 SMB 访问的托管 AWS 存储服务。该解决方案必须能够在协议之间共享。该解决方案必须在可用区级别具有冗余。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has multiple Microsoft Windows SMB file servers and Linux NFS file servers for file sharing in an on-premises environment. As part of the company's AWS migration plan, the company wants to consolidate the file servers in the AWS Cloud. The company needs a managed AWS storage service that supports both NFS and SMB access. The solution must be able to share between protocols. The solution must have redundancy at the Availability Zone level. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 进行存储。配置多协议访问。
A.en: Use Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP for storage. Configure multi-protocol access.

B.zh: 创建两个 Amazon EC2 实例。使用 1 个 EC2 实例进行 Windows SMB 文件服务器访问，使用 1 个 EC2 实例进行 Linux NFS 文件服务器访问。
B.en: Create two Amazon EC2 instances. Use one EC2 instance for Windows SMB file server access and one EC2 instance for Linux NFS file server access.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 进行 SMB 访问。使用 Amazon FSx for Lustre 进行 NFS 访问。
C.en: Use Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP for SMB access. Use Amazon FSx for Lustre for NFS access.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 存储。通过 Amazon S3 文件网关访问 Amazon S3。
D.en: Use Amazon S3 storage. Access Amazon S3 through an Amazon S3 File Gateway.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 支持使用 NFS 和 SMB 协议，并允许跨协议共享文件。这完全符合题主的要求。此外， Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 提供高可用性和跨可用区冗余，以满足冗余要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP supports the use of NFS and SMB protocols and allows file sharing across protocols. This fully meets the requirements of the question. In addition, Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP provides high availability and cross-AZ redundancy to meet redundancy requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然 SMB 和 NFS 访问可通过 EC2 实例单独使用，但这不是托管服务，不能跨协议共享。此外， EC2 实例需要额外的管理工作，并且没有内置的高可用性和跨可用区冗余。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While SMB and NFS access are available individually through EC2 instances, this is not a hosted service and cannot be shared across protocols. Additionally, EC2 instances require additional management effort and do not have built-in high availability and cross-AZ redundancy.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon FSx for Lustre 仅支持 NFS 协议，但主要用于高性能计算场景，不适合一般文件共享。另外，这个方案无法跨协议共享文件，不符合问题的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon FSx for Luster only supports the NFS protocol, but it is mainly used in high-performance computing scenarios and is not suitable for general file sharing. In addition, this solution cannot share files across protocols and does not meet the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon S3 是一种对象存储服务，而不是文件存储服务。虽然可以通过 S3 文件网关访问 S3，但它不支持 NFS 和 SMB 协议的直接访问。另外， S3文件网关无法跨协议共享文件，不满足题目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 is an object storage service, not a file storage service. While S3 can be accessed through the S3 File Gateway, it does not support direct access for the NFS and SMB protocols. In addition, S3 file gateway cannot share files across protocols and does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 进行存储。配置多协议访问。
answer_text.en: A. Use Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP for storage. Configure multi-protocol access.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 支持使用 NFS 和 SMB 协议，并允许跨协议共享文件。这完全符合题主的要求。此外， Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP 提供高可用性和跨可用区冗余，以满足冗余要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP supports the use of NFS and SMB protocols and allows file sharing across protocols. This fully meets the requirements of the question. In addition, Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP provides high availability and cross-AZ redundancy to meet redundancy requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家软件公司需要升级关键的 Web 应用程序。该应用程序当前在该公司在公有子网中托管的单个 Amazon EC2 实例上运行。 EC2 实例运行 MySQL 数据库。应用程序的 DNS 记录在 Amazon Route 53 区域中发布。解决方案架构师必须重新配置应用程序，使其具有可扩展性和高可用性。解决方案架构师还必须减少 MySQL 读取延迟。哪种解决方案组合可以满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A software company needs to upgrade a critical web application. The application currently runs on a single Amazon EC2 instance that the company hosts in a public subnet. The EC2 instance runs a MySQL database. The application's DNS records are published in an Amazon Route 53 zone. A solutions architect must reconfigure the application to be scalable and highly available. The solutions architect must also reduce MySQL read latency. Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 在第二个 AWS 区域启动第二个 EC2 实例。使用 Route 53 故障转移路由策略将流量重定向到第二个 EC2 实例。
A.en: Launch a second EC2 instance in a second AWS Region. Use a Route 53 failover routing policy to redirect the traffic to the second EC2 instance.

B.zh: 创建并配置 Auto Scaling 组以在多个可用区中启动私有 EC2 实例。将实例添加到新应用程序负载均衡器后面的目标组。
B.en: Create and configure an Auto Scaling group to launch private EC2 instances in multiple Availability Zones. Add the instances to a target group behind a new Application Load Balancer.

C.zh: 将数据库迁移到 Amazon Aurora MySQL 集群。在不同的可用区中创建主数据库实例和读取器数据库实例。
C.en: Migrate the database to an Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster. Create the primary DB instance and reader DB instance in separate Availability Zones.

D.zh: 创建并配置 Auto Scaling 组以在多个 AWS 区域中启动私有 EC2 实例。将实例添加到新应用程序负载均衡器后面的目标组。
D.en: Create and configure an Auto Scaling group to launch private EC2 instances in multiple AWS Regions. Add the instances to a target group behind a new Application Load Balancer.

E.zh: 将数据库迁移到具有跨区域只读副本的 Amazon Aurora MySQL 集群。
E.en: Migrate the database to an Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster with cross-Region read replicas.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：故障转移路由策略虽然可以提高容灾能力，但无法实现实用的高可用性和可扩展性。单独启动 EC2 实例并不能解决数据库读取延迟问题。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although the failover routing strategy can improve disaster recovery capabilities, it cannot achieve practical high availability and scalability. Launching an EC2 instance alone does not solve the database read latency issue.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：使用 Auto Scaling 组和应用程序负载均衡器跨多个可用区实现高可用性和可扩展性。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Achieve high availability and scalability across multiple Availability Zones using Auto Scaling groups and Application Load Balancers.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： Amazon Aurora MySQL 支持多可用区部署，通过只读副本降低数据库读取延迟，满足问题需求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon Aurora MySQL supports multi-availability zone deployment and reduces database read latency through read-only replicas to meet problem requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然跨区域 Auto Scaling 组可以改善灾难恢复，但问题是需要在单个区域内实现高可用性和可扩展性。此外，跨区域部署会增加复杂性和成本。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While cross-region Auto Scaling groups can improve disaster recovery, the problem is the need for high availability and scalability within a single region. Additionally, deploying across regions adds complexity and cost.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然跨区域只读副本可以减少跨区域读取延迟，但问题中并没有提到需要跨区域访问数据库。该选项超出了问题要求。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although cross-region read replicas can reduce cross-region read latency, the question does not mention the need to access the database across regions. This option is beyond the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: B. 创建并配置 Auto Scaling 组以在多个可用区中启动私有 EC2 实例。将实例添加到新应用程序负载均衡器后面的目标组。；C. 将数据库迁移到 Amazon Aurora MySQL 集群。在不同的可用区中创建主数据库实例和读取器数据库实例。
answer_text.en: B. Create and configure an Auto Scaling group to launch private EC2 instances in multiple Availability Zones. Add the instances to a target group behind a new Application Load Balancer.; C. Migrate the database to an Amazon Aurora MySQL cluster. Create the primary DB instance and reader DB instance in separate Availability Zones.
